title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Mass Azithromycin for Under-5 Mortality in Sub-Saharan Africa v1.0
hero_h2: Biannual Mass Azithromycin Drug Administration to Reduce Under-5 Mortality
nyt_headline: The Mass Azithromycin Child Mortality Evidence

pico.pop: Children aged 1-59 months in sub-Saharan African communities with high under-5 mortality (MORDOR-I: Niger / Malawi / Tanzania; MORDOR-II / AVENIR: Niger)
pico.int: Biannual single-dose oral azithromycin (20 mg/kg, mass drug administration to all eligible children regardless of infection status)
pico.comp: Placebo (MORDOR-I/II) or no MDA control (AVENIR design partially unblinded for some arms)
pico.out: All-cause under-5 mortality (primary; reported as incidence rate ratio over 2-year follow-up). Secondary: cause-specific mortality, antimicrobial resistance.
pico.subgroup: Country, age (1-11 vs 12-59 months -- AVENIR isolated infants), baseline mortality rate, vaccination coverage

real_data_entries.name: MORDOR-I
real_data_entries.group: Cluster-RCT in Niger / Malawi / Tanzania, biannual single-dose azithromycin vs placebo in children 1-59 months; 2-year follow-up; primary all-cause under-5 mortality, IRR pooled across countries

allOutcomes.title: All-cause under-5 mortality at 2 years (primary, IRR pooled across countries)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Keenan JD et al. NEJM 2018;378:1583-1592 (MORDOR-I biannual azithromycin MDA).

real_data_entries.name: MORDOR-II
real_data_entries.group: Cluster-RCT continuation in Niger only, MORDOR-I placebo communities crossed over to azithromycin; 2-year extension; primary all-cause under-5 mortality

allOutcomes.title: All-cause under-5 mortality at year 4 vs continued placebo control (IRR)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Keenan JD et al. Lancet Glob Health 2020 (MORDOR-II Niger extension).

real_data_entries.name: AVENIR
real_data_entries.group: Cluster-RCT in Niger; biannual azithromycin restricted to infants 1-11 months vs control; 2-year follow-up; primary all-cause infant mortality (1-11 mo subgroup, where MDA effect strongest)

allOutcomes.title: All-cause mortality 1-11 months at 2 years (primary subgroup, IRR)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: O'Brien KS et al. NEJM 2024;390:2249-2260 (AVENIR Niger biannual azithromycin in infants).
